channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] NEED NCV CHIEF ENGINEER FOR BULK CARRIER at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 4th Engineer position is available to support the engine department's daily operations and maintenance tasks.



Apply to this job

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are invited for a 3rd Engineer role, focusing on engine room operations and maintenance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 2nd Engineer position is open, responsible for engine maintenance and assisting the Chief Engineer.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking a Chief Engineer to manage the engine department and ensure the operational efficiency of vessel machinery.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are being accepted for the role of Chief Engineer. Interested parties should download the Chief Engineer's Application Form and send it via email. Information on vessel type, contract length, and joining dates is not provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime employer is accepting applications for Engine Officer roles. Interested individuals must download the specified application form and submit it by email. Information regarding vessel type, contract length, and embarkation dates is not available in this listing.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officer Job Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime company is seeking applications for the position of 2nd Engineer. Interested candidates should download the relevant application form and submit it via email. Further details regarding specific vessel types, contract terms, or joining dates are not provided in this announcement.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime employer requires a 3rd Engineer to assist with engine room operations. This position offers a chance to gain valuable experience. Information on contract and joining will be shared.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Vacancy at Arcadia Shipmanagement Company Limited

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking a qualified 2nd Engineer for a maritime role. Responsibilities include engine maintenance and operational support. Further details on the position will be provided during the application process.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Vacancy at Arcadia Shipmanagement Company Limited
